pub fn zenflate::error::StreamError<E>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<E> core::convert::From<zenflate::error::DecompressionError> for zenflate::error::StreamError<E>
pub fn zenflate::error::StreamError<E>::from(zenflate::error::DecompressionError) -> Self
impl<E> core::marker::Freeze for zenflate::error::StreamError<E> where E: core::marker::Freeze

pub struct zenflate::StreamDecompressor<S>

pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::advance(&mut self, usize)
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::deflate(S, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::fill(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<&[u8], zenflate::error::StreamError<<S as zenflate::decompress::streaming::InputSource>::Error>>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::gzip(S, usize) -> Self

pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::peek(&self) -> &[u8]
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::reset(&mut self, S)
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::zlib(S, usize) -> Self
impl<S> zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::checksum_matched(&self) -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::into_inner(self) -> S
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::source_ref(&self) -> &S
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::with_max_output_size(self, core::option::Option<usize>) -> Self
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::with_skip_checksum(self, bool) -> Self

pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>::consume(&mut self, usize)
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>::fill_buf(&mut self) -> std::io::error::Result<&[u8]>

impl<S: core::fmt::Debug> core::fmt::Debug for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<S> core::marker::Freeze for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::Freeze
impl<S> core::marker::Send for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::Send
impl<S> core::marker::Sync for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::Sync

pub struct zenflate::StreamDecompressor<S>
impl<S: zenflate::decompress::streaming::InputSource> zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::advance(&mut self, usize)
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::deflate(S, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::fill(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<&[u8], zenflate::error::StreamError<<S as zenflate::decompress::streaming::InputSource>::Error>>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::gzip(S, usize) -> Self
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::is_done(&self) -> bool
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::peek(&self) -> &[u8]
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::reset(&mut self, S)
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::zlib(S, usize) -> Self
impl<S> zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::checksum_matched(&self) -> core::option::Option<bool>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::into_inner(self) -> S
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::source_ref(&self) -> &S
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::with_max_output_size(self, core::option::Option<usize>) -> Self
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::with_skip_checksum(self, bool) -> Self
impl<R: std::io::BufRead> std::io::BufRead for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>::consume(&mut self, usize)
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>::fill_buf(&mut self) -> std::io::error::Result<&[u8]>
impl<R: std::io::BufRead> std::io::Read for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>>::read(&mut self, &mut [u8]) -> std::io::error::Result<usize>
impl<S: core::fmt::Debug> core::fmt::Debug for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S>::fmt(&self, &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<S> core::marker::Freeze for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::Freeze
impl<S> core::marker::Send for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::Send
impl<S> core::marker::Sync for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::Sync
impl<S> core::marker::Unpin for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::Unpin
impl<S> core::marker::UnsafeUnpin for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::marker::UnsafeUnpin
impl<S> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe
impl<S> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for zenflate::decompress::streaming::StreamDecompressor<S> where S: core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe
pub const zenflate::DEFAULT_CAPACITY: usize
pub trait zenflate::InputSource
pub type zenflate::InputSource::Error
pub fn zenflate::InputSource::consume(&mut self, usize)
pub fn zenflate::InputSource::fill_buf(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<&[u8], Self::Error>
impl zenflate::decompress::streaming::InputSource for &[u8]
pub type &[u8]::Error = core::convert::Infallible
pub fn &[u8]::consume(&mut self, usize)
pub fn &[u8]::fill_buf(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<&[u8], core::convert::Infallible>
impl<R: std::io::BufRead> zenflate::decompress::streaming::InputSource for zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>
pub type zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>::Error = std::io::error::Error
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>::consume(&mut self, usize)
pub fn zenflate::decompress::streaming::BufReadSource<R>::fill_buf(&mut self) -> core::result::Result<&[u8], std::io::error::Error>
pub fn zenflate::adler32(u32, &[u8]) -> u32
pub fn zenflate::adler32_combine(u32, u32, usize) -> u32
pub fn zenflate::crc32(u32, &[u8]) -> u32
pub fn zenflate::crc32_combine(u32, u32, usize) -> u32
